title: Permanent Vacation
synopsis:
"Well, I have my dreams while I’m awake.”
Wandering New York's decaying downtown, drifting teenager Allie encounters eccentric misfits while dreaming of a distant escape. Jarmusch used his NYU fellowship money to finance the $12,000 budget, shooting on 16mm film over ten days. Inspired by the downtown punk scene, he proved that the most important criterion for making a film is simply having something to express.

synopsis_lang.en:
"Well, I have my dreams while I’m awake.”
Wandering New York's decaying downtown, drifting teenager Allie encounters eccentric misfits while dreaming of a distant escape. Jarmusch used his NYU fellowship money to finance the $12,000 budget, shooting on 16mm film over ten days. Inspired by the downtown punk scene, he proved that the most important criterion for making a film is simply having something to express.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
「我醒着的時候做夢。」
紐約青年艾利整天在破敗的下城區浪蕩，遇上形形色色的怪人，度過漫無目的的兩天半。他渴望能逃離這座城市，踏上永遠的旅程。占渣木殊將本來用作交紐約大學學費的獎學金，投入這部僅花十天、以一萬二千美元成本完成的16mm首部長片。深受紐約Punk文化啟發的他，深深體現出創作最重要的條件並非精湛技藝，而是有話想說。

cast: Chris Parker, Leila Gastil, John Lurie

cast_lang.en: Chris Parker, Leila Gastil, John Lurie
cast_lang.zh_hk: Chris Parker, Leila Gastil, John Lurie
